zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicolas Marchal於大約1652年出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾希米可時，他的父親Christophe Marchal35歲，母親Catherine Garat34歲。他於1680年2月3日與Marie Charton在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾希米可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1716年6月15日在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾拉 布洛可享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicolas Marchal于大约1652年出生在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾希米可时，他的父亲Christophe Marchal35岁，母亲Catherine Garat34岁。他于1680年2月3日与Marie Charton在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾希米可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1716年6月15日在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾拉 布洛可享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marchal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gilles, Jacques, Maryse, Philippe, Pierre, Veronique.

French and Walloon: status name or occupational name from Old French maresc(h)al ‘marshal’. The term is of ancient Germanic origin (from marah ‘horse, mare’ + scalc ‘servant’) and was originally applied to a man who looked after horses. In the Middle Ages it also came to be used on the one hand as an occupational name for a farrier, and on the other as a status name for an officer of state, in particular a member of a royal household with military responsibilities. Compare English Marshall and 2 below.
English: variant of   Marshall  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland, and is found mainly in Glamorgan, Wales.

variants.name: Marshall
meanings: English: usually an occupational name ‘farrier’, occasionally a status name ‘chief official of a royal household or court; a high officer of state’, from Middle English mareshal and Old French maresc(h)al. An even wider range of meanings is found in some other languages: compare for example Polish Marszałek (see Marszalek ). This name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. It is also borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Marichal
meanings: French (northern), Walloon, and Spanish (Canary Islands): variant of French   Marchal  . This surname, which is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium, is established in the Canary Island since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Nicolas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nicolao
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicolas Marchal was born about 1652, in Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, his father, Christophe Marchal, was 35 and his mother, Catherine Garat, was 34. He married Marie Charton on 3 February 1680, in Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 June 1716, in La Broque, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicolas Marchal est né environ 1652, à Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Christophe Marchal, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Catherine Garat, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Marie Charton le 3 février 1680, à Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1716, à La Broque, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicolas Marchal um 1652 in Schirmeck, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christophe Marchal 35 und seine Mutter Catherine Garat 34. Er hat am 3. Februar 1680 in Schirmeck, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich Marie Charton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Juni 1716 im Alter von 65 Jahren in La Broque, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolas Marchal è nato il circa 1652 nel Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, il suo padre, Christophe Marchal, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Garat, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Marie Charton il 3 febbraio 1680, nel Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 giugno 1716, nel La Broque, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicolas Marchalが約1652年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンスチルメックで生まれた時，父Christophe Marchalは35歳，母Catherine Garatは34歳であった。1680年2月3日にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンスチルメックでMarie Chartonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1716年6月15日にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンラ ブロクで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicolas Marchal(이)가 대략 1652년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 시c크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christophe Marchal(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Garat(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1680년 2월 3일 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 시c크에서 Marie Charton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1716년 6월 15일 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 라 브로크에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolas Marchal nasceu aproximadamente 1652, em Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, seu pai, Christophe Marchal, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Garat, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie Charton em 3 de fevereiro de 1680, em Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1716, em La Broque, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicolas Marchal родился около 1652 г. в местности щирмекк, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Christophe Marchal было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Garat, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie Charton 3 февраля 1680 г. в местности щирмекк, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 июня 1716 г. в местности ла броку, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicolas Marchal nació aproximadamente 1652, en Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, su papá, Christophe Marchal, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Catherine Garat, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Marie Charton el 3 de febrero de 1680, en Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de junio de 1716, en La Broque, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, a la edad de 65 años.
